## deleteTagDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `delete-tag` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `delete-tag` and the MCP tool `tag_delete`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deleteTagDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    tagId: string;
}, DeleteTagResult, z.ZodObject<{
    tagId: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    tagId: string;
}, {
    tagId: string;
}>>
```
